title: Astracantha noeana
taxonomy: Astracantha noeana is a species of thorny shrub in the pea family Fabaceae. It is classified within the subfamily Faboideae. Within this subfamily, Astracantha noeana belongs to the tribe Crotalarieae. Further classification places it in the genus Astracantha. The species is native to the Mediterranean region.
uses: Astracantha noeana is a species of plant that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. Research has shown that extracts from the plant have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. Additionally, the plant has been used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems. However, more research is needed to fully understand the plant's medicinal uses and potential applications. Further studies are necessary to confirm the efficacy and safety of Astracantha noeana as a medicinal plant.

The plant's extracts may help to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with urinary tract infections.
